name: com.likeon.narrative
description: Single-player narrative core for Unity: branching dialogue, a state-machine quest system, and save/load. Standalone and string-based, with no third-party or ecosystem dependencies. Combat/GAS, networking, AI, character creator and graph editors are intentionally out of scope.

samples.description: One script: begin quest → play dialogue → event completes a data-task → quest succeeds → save → restore.
Attach events to quest states (grant reward / show banner on entry) and see how RefireOnLoad behaves on load.
